overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a drive through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk, stopping at a pedestrian crosswalk, then transitioning to third-person perspective following a masked character walking along a sidewalk beneath elevated highways. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and wet reflective streets characteristic of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic multi-lane arterial road with palm trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on a wide city boulevard lined with skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving in the adjacent lane, passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass building with illuminated windows rising above the street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard
large glowing advertisement display on building facade
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines approaching ahead
large white billboard featuring a stylized figure with 'Nicola' text visible

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving along a wide multi-lane boulevard in a futuristic city at dusk. Tall glass skyscrapers tower overhead while palm trees line the street. The camera approaches a large pedestrian crosswalk with a prominent 'Nicola' advertisement billboard visible in the distance. Other futuristic vehicles share the road, moving at moderate speed through the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian crosswalk at major intersection

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop at the crosswalk to allow pedestrians to cross
pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicle

agents.ego_description: stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians to clear the intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in casual clothing walking across the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: dark-colored futuristic car stopped at the intersection alongside the ego vehicle

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a broad yellow-striped crosswalk as pedestrians begin crossing the street. The 'Nicola' billboard is now prominently visible straight ahead. Several pedestrians walk across the intersection in front of the vehicle, including a woman in the foreground. The scene captures the bustling intersection activity typical of the city center, with other vehicles stopped alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with neon signage and street vendors

events.description: perspective switches from first-person driving to third-person following a masked pedestrian character

agents.ego_description: following closely behind a muscular character wearing a distinctive silver luchador mask and tank top as they walk along the wet sidewalk

notable_agents.action: masked character walking steadily along the sidewalk, leading the camera through the crowd

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead
low concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk separating from a lower level
large illuminated digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
small shop or food stall with glowing signage and overhead cover

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person view following a distinctive masked character walking along a wet sidewalk beneath elevated highways. The environment features dense neon signage, digital billboards, and street-level shops. The concrete barrier wall runs along the right side while the elevated highway structure dominates the skyline ahead. Other pedestrians walk along the same path, and the wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights of the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a high-speed drive through a neon-lit urban canyon to a grounded, pedestrian perspective beneath the city's massive infrastructure. It begins with a vehicle gliding along a wide boulevard lined with palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers, moving steadily toward a prominent Nicola advertisement. As the vehicle slows to a halt at a broad yellow-striped crosswalk, the camera lingers on the bustling intersection activity and pedestrians crossing the street. The perspective then shifts seamlessly to a third-person view, following a masked character walking along a wet sidewalk where the pavement reflects the vibrant glow of digital billboards. The scene finally settles into a dense corridor of street-level shops and neon signage, moving beneath the heavy concrete shadows of elevated highways.
